title: `akar #5916
definition:
1) to trouble, stir up, disturb, make (someone) taboo
    1a) (Qal) to disturb, trouble
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be disturbed, be stirred up
        1b2) disturbance, calamity (participle)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to trouble, stir up, disturb, make (someone) taboo
    1a) (Qal) to disturb, trouble
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be disturbed, be stirred up
        1b2) disturbance, calamity (participle)

    NASB:  to stir up, disturb, trouble
